topRepos.name: distill-modern-bert
topRepos.description: Distills ModernBERT into a compact Model2Vec embedding model, preserving strong retrieval quality with lower compute and latency.

topRepos.name: comche
topRepos.description: Fast Go pre-commit checker that scans Python comments for tags like TODO and BUG to enforce commit hygiene.

topRepos.name: vidscribe
topRepos.description: Monitors YouTube channels, summarizes new videos with Gemini, and sends notifications as a scheduled cloud job.
